extortion.description: NARUMI (THAILAND) CO., LTD. is a subsidiary of Narumi Goukin Manufacturing Co., Ltd. of Japan, established in June 2010 and located in the WHA Eastern Seaboard Industrial Estate, Rayong, Thailand. The company specializes in the manufacturing of plastic automotive components such as door handles, tailgate handles, and roof rails, primarily supplying major automotive manufacturers including Mitsubishi Motors (Thailand), Honda Automobile (Thailand), and Hitachi Chemical Automotive Products (Thailand). With approximately 130 employees, NARUMI (THAILAND) holds ISO/TS 16949 and ISO 14001 certifications, ensuring high standards in both quality management and environmental responsibility. In 2022, the company reported revenues of 622 million THB and a net profit of 41.6 million THB.
